summary: Completed e2e testing of new Cancelamentos page (/cancelamentos) and Templates de Mensagem integration on PedidoDetalhePage. All features working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Chart width/height -1 - known issue from previous iterations (non-blocking)

Backend cancelamento endpoints return correct data structures and HTTP status codes
Templates API (email/whatsapp) render correctly with dynamic data substitution
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.backend: 100% - All 16 cancelamento and templates API tests passed
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements verified and interactive

context_for_next_testing_agent: Cancelamentos page and TemplatesMensagem integration fully tested. Backend has 16 passing tests for /api/cancelamento/* and /api/regras/templates/* endpoints. Frontend verified via Playwright with login, navigation, and template button clicks working.

tests: 3 responsibility cards displayed (Solicitado pelo Candidato, Pré-Análise/Análise, Matriculado)
Search input (data-testid='input-busca-pedido') accepts input and triggers search
Toast notification 'Pedido não encontrado' shows for invalid search
Flow diagram visible with all steps (Candidato → CAC → NRM → Revertido/Confirmado)
Email tab shows different template options
Telefone do Aluno field pre-populated from aluno data
Template buttons are clickable and have proper data-testid attributes

POST /api/regras/templates/email/render - Renders email with data substitution
